hooks.command: APPENDONLY_PATHS='improvement-log\.md|decisions/' APPENDONLY_MSG='improvement-log.md and decisions/ are append-only. Mark stale, do not delete.' ~/Projects/skills/hooks/pretool-append-only-guard.sh

echo 'CHECKLIST: (1) Did you implement changes in the target repo, or only write about them here? (2) Did you update maintenance-checklist.md with what was done? (3) Is every proposed change testable (observable before/after)?'
